title: Simple FPS Counter
description: This mod will show fps in the game. A simple fps counter that will allow you to see the current number of frames per second.
body: This mod will show fps in the game. A simple fps counter that will allow you to see the current number of frames per second. The mod allows you to enable and disable the fps display at any time. In addition, you can press the "}" key and you can change the position of the counter on the screen. In addition, by pressing the " ' " key, you can change the color of the fps counter to any color that is convenient for you. The keys can always be reassigned in the control settings.
